I am 5’7” 168lbs and carry most of my extra weight in my tummy. I ordered a size 12 regular. I’m not sure if I want to keep these or not. They are very long so would definitely have to wear them with a healed shoe if I don’t want them to drag. They have a good stretch and fit comfortably but I’m not happy with the way my mom pooch shows. Maybe it’s the light color? Idk. I’ll try them on with a few other shirts. Besides length and my own insecurities they really are a great flared jean.
I am 5’7” and 125lbs but I prefer a looser fit so I got a medium and the fit is AMAZING. They are softer then I expected and I want to order them in every print now!

I am 5'7" and 155lbs with a 31" waist. I normally wear between a size M and L and got these in a size L, they fit perfectly. These are super nice jeans. They have a nice deep color and a cute style to them. They have some stretch as well and are comfy to wear. They didn't stretch too much throughout the day and stayed in place nicely. I would highly recommend!

I am 5'7" and 160lbs with a 31" waist I normally wear between a size M and L, I got this in a size L and it was slightly oversized.This gave me Free People vibes and looks to be a dupe of one of their other shirts but I really wasn't impressed with how it looked on or the quality. The edges are unfinished and did have a small line of stitching to prevent further unraveling, but the unfinished edges didn't look intentional...they just looked sloppy.The fit to this is weird. The arms were really long and there are no buttons or elastic so you can't roll them up and have them stay up. The material has no give to it, so you can't push them up your arms either. The cut was very oversized but strangely short in length and the slits up the sides were oddly placed. I just thought it was a very unflattering and non-functional piece.The material is a think but strangely stiff denim, a stiffness I might expect out of a thicker denim but not out of a demin this thin. It was uncomfortable to wear and unflattering. I won't be keeping and would struggle to recommend this, especially at this higher price point. This looked and felt cheap to me.

I am 5'7" and 160lbs with a 31" waist. I normally wear between a size M and L. I got this in a size L and they fit perfectly. These are very similar to the Halara Magic Denim jeans, they have that very silky soft legging feeling to them. They have great movement and feel cool and silky against your legs. The wide waistband is flattering and they have plenty of stretch, you can literally work out in these if you want with no issues.I love that they have decent sized hand pockets and butt pockets. These wash up beautifully without any shrinkage in the laundry.I have a couple pairs of the Halara Magic Demin pants and absolutely love them but have really been wanting a place to buy something similar that didn't come from Halara. These pants are perfect for that, they are exactly the same and just as amazing to wear.These are an excellent, lightweight, flattering, comfy jean and I can't recommend them enough. So excited to have a jean option like this to buy on amazon!

I am 5'7" and about 170 lbs and found these pants to be a bit long - not exactly capris as advertised. They hit just above the ankle and I am taller than the average American woman. However, they are comfy and flattering straight out of the box and seem pretty wrinkle resistant so far (waz suprised they arrived rolled up umbrella fashion). The navy color is as advertised; maybe a little richer in person. The ruched fringe at the top is thankfully not as large as the pictures show. The pockets are large and the material is breathable and pretty sturdy. Good value for the price.
I am 5’7” and I thought a long would not be too long for me. It was way too long so I tried a regular still 4 inches too long . The material is nice though and the jeans are very comi.

I am 5'7" and shaped like a viola. I saw other pictures and reviews that made these look like jeggings with pockets. Clearly, I was mistaken. I did order the Longs in both sizes and will say if you like your pants long enough to sit, Long length is the way to go. I will probably return these thougg as I need pants that aren't going to bunch up with my low boots. Fabric is great. Color is great.

I am 5'7" and weigh 115, and the size of a small AUWUKA women's high waist jean shorts fits well. While the product description indicates 61.7% cotton, 37.1% polyester, and 1.2% Spandex, there's no label on the short indicating the same. The shorts have a good amount of stretch, and the back pockets are big enough to hold a phone. Overall, they are comfortable shorts.

I am 5'7" and weigh 280 lbs. (I know) I am posting some maybe not so flattering pics of my belly pouch but hopefully gives someone with same stats an idea of how these fit. First thing I absolutely loved is the color, exactly as pictured. They material is soft yet sturdy and the stretch is perfect and a nice snug..(I feel cute) fit. The waistband is super confortable.. not like a regular jean and it doesn't cut Into your waist. Important if you have a a belly and pouch like me. The length is perfect all the way down to my ankle. There was no weird smells. When I sit or bend down my backside business stays my business. They feel almost like a second skin like I could wear them all day and not even think about it. I would definitely recommend. Love the price too as I recently had gastric sleeve and am having to buy others more often I definitely will buy these at the next size down. Overall great buy for the money. Very satisfied!!

I am 5’7” and weight 160 lbs I got both the medium and large. Both fit but I decided the medium for a little better sound my waist. I figured they would stretch a little since I wear them multiple times between washing. My only complaint (and why I took off one star) is the smell. They smell so chemically. At this point I have washed them many times, and done soaks in vinegar, baking soda and borax. They smell less but the scent is still there.

I am 5'7" between 170-175 pounds and I am in between the sizes 10 and 12. I got the large and I should have gotten the medium. These are super wide! I feel like I'm swimming in these, but I also think maybe that's the style of the pant. ha! I do like them, and they are super lightweight and comfortable. They are also long. They reach the floor for me. Even so, I'm looking forward to wearing these during hotter summer days.

I am 5'7" tall and weigh 150lbs I usually wear a size 5 juniors long. I ordered a 9 based on reviews saying to size up and it fits perfect, I probably could have ordered a 7 these are super stretchy , but they would have been more snug . These pants are soooo comfortable. The length is perfect with or without heels. I got the velcro close and they are awesome! No buttons showing through tighter shirts. These are straight leg, not boot cut or flare, but not skinny at the ankle by any means. They have no pockets on the butt (which I love). I ordered another pair in black and two denim with velcro closure. These are officially my new favorite jeans.

I am 5'7" with tummy and 52 inch hips. I got a 3x. Fit is excellent (nothing feels restricted or stretched to the max), but as will happen with comfy pants, there is zero tummy control. Extremely versatile for casual or work attire, flats or heels.

I am 5'7", 150lbs, and 3 months postpartum. I got the medium size. I like these pants a lot and bought 4 pairs. They give support and hide my postpartum belly. I also like the length. I've washed them in the machine in cold water on the gentle cycle and hang dried them a few times now, the color and material has remained the same so far. They did not fade or shrink. They are soft, light and comfy. Perfect for warm weather days.

I am 5’7”, 165 lbs, and typically an 8 in bottoms (more for the hips than the waist). I got these in a large after much deliberation and I am glad I did because these fit perfectly. Amazon did suggest I get a medium based on data they had, and honestly the size chart was leaning me towards a medium as well. But I know how shorts can fit me, so I definitely went up a size and I am glad I did. These fit very comfortably and are snug but not too tight anywhere. They feel just like leggings but in shorts, so they are very stretchy. They do ride up a bit, so I could see that getting annoying to have to constantly pull them down all the time. All in all a good pair of shorts, I could see me styling these with oversized long shirts and tunics. For a comfy but cute fit!

I am 5’8 and 140 pounds, and ordered a size 28. I am 5'8, 157lbs, and I ordered the 10 long in the "Inspire Blue" color. I am thrilled with my purchase! My jeans hit me just above my bellybutton and hold my tummy in place. I wasnt sure if I should have ordered a long or standard, but I tried long. It stops at the floor, right at my heels. I dont mind but some people might prefer to have it shorter. The quality of the denim is sturdy and thicker than the cheaper n thinner jeans u might find at Walmart. The only weird thing was the smell (reminds me of my grandmas closet) but I love this! I will be back to buy more colors!

I am 5’8” 140lbs wearing size 4 they fit like a glove. These are just bootcut though not flares. But otherwise good. Comfortable & feel like decent material. They do feel a little thinner than traditional jeans but I do recommend them.

I am 5’8” and 210lbs. Thick hips and bum. Wearing a size XL. Unfortunately due to my long legs (32in inseam) I have to return them. I’m sad that these pants didn’t work out for me, as they are so buttery soft and lightweight. I also love the pattern!

I am 5'8" and 212 pounds. I ordered an 18 Long. I have been looking for a well-fitted PULL-ON jean for months now. This is it! These are comfortable and long enough without being too long. I do NOT like jeans that run short - just my preference. These are long enough and fit well. I DO wish they had belt-loops to pull them on easier and real front pockets, but they don't. I will miss having real front pockets b/c I use them when I have them. But otherwise, for the price, still a great find. Give them a try! I have not washed them yet so do not know how they'll do after laundering. These I just tried on right out of the package.

I am 5'8" and about 130. I am usually a small, but I followed the size chart and ordered a medium in these. When I first put them on, they were perfect and snug, but like many denim items they loosened up and ended the day a little more relaxed looking. The photo is from the end of the day. The color is also a little bit pinker than they look here. I like the look as is, but these are so stretchy I think if I wanted a tighter fit I could have gone with an S.Here is the biggest complement I can give to an internet clothing order. I opened them last night and wanted to wear them immediately. I planned today's outfit around them. I went full hello barbie and paired them with a brighter pink tee. I felt great in them! You do have to watch the fly, as with many zippered high waisted options they need to have the zipper secured properly. And, I kept trying to put my hands into front pockets that aren't there. But I adore these. For this price? Forget about it. Order them.

I am 5’8” and about 140 lbs and my size 4 jeans don’t fit anymore. So I figured I am now a size 6 and ordered the medium. They fit well, are stretchy, and comfortable. Also, flattering. Would recommend.
I am 5'8" and am so happy to find long skinny jeans. I just like having a little extra fabric around my ankles. My measurements are 30" waist and 40" hip. The black fabric is very stretchy.

I am 5'8" with proportionately longer legs. My size in jeans is usually 4/6 or 27. I wanted length in these, so I ordered up to an 8. They are very roomy, I think to get the tight fit on the model I would have needed a 4. But the length is great! And they are really stretchy and comfy. I dig 'em.

I am 5'8", 132 lbs wearing 3.5" heels. Loved the fit, fabric, length, and style. Perfect for what I was looking for. Just wish they made the small-long size in the other colors, but I will be purchasing more of the other ones offered.
I am 5'8", 148 lbs. these capri's are perfect! I am going to order another pair. Love them! So comfortable!
I am 5'8", 148 lbs. these capri's are perfect! I am going to order another pair. Love them! So comfortable!

I am 5'8", 160lb. Thicker thighs and calves than the average. My waist is high. I require 34" inseam. I bought the 10L. These jeans fit perfect, very stretchy and comfortable. The waist is in a good place, higher than many jeans but not too high like 'high waisted' jeans. I also bought the darker color, they fit equally well. They are stretchy enough that they will still fit well when i lose a few pounds ;-)

I am 5'8", 180lbs and I got the 14 plus size. This is how they fit me. I really like them. I usually don't like high waisted pants, but these I don't mind. They are really comfortable and I am probably going to buy some in other colors.

I am 5’8”, approx 170lbs with a 30” waist and 40” hips. I struggle to find pants - jeans specifically - that fit me how I like, and usually don’t have a ton of luck online. I took a chance on these and I’m so glad. Are they perfect? No - I wish the zipper was about 2” longer because when I first went to put them on I thought there was no way they were fitting, but once they were up they fit my waist and have the perfect amount of room through my hips and thighs that I have been looking for. They check a lot of boxes for me, and are even ever-so-slightly long which I never find anymore, and is one of my favorite things to have in loose jeans. I ordered my usual size, 12, again being skeptical, but it’s just right. They fit to my waist without digging in - I had abdominal surgery a year ago and now have a belly pooch that makes most jeans uncomfortable - but I can wear these all day. Also I haven’t had to touch it, but I love that they have the adjustable strap at the waist in back to get just the right fit.

I am 5’9 - 137 - 25.5-26 inch waist and 36.5 hip and the size 5 were a little too loose. I’m so sad bc they are so cute so I’m exchanging them for 3. I like a tight fit and there was so much room in the hips and stomach area for the size 5. Should have gone with 3’s. They are tight in the calves but mine are like jokingly tiny so I could see how that may be a problem for someone else. Update: (picture included) I like the 3’s better. I probably could have gone with 1’s for reference. May pick up 1s later but the 3s are nice. I’m pretty happy with the butt but it could be slightly more flattering with the back pockets in my opinion but great for me to wear these as they’re extremely comfy and I’m a leggings or skirt/dress person. They are a little loose in the crotch so keep that in mind you may be able to go smaller if we have a similar figure to me and you like a tight fit.

I am 5'9 141lbs and have long legs... so sometimes it's hard to find jeans long enough for my legs. I decided to try these and see how they would look. I am shocked how much I love these. I have a pretty curvy bottom and these stretch and fit my bum nice, without being overly tight on it. I ordered a medium and adore the fit. I am going to order another pair in the light color.
I am 5'9 and 175 and they were long enough to wear heels with. So soft and comfortable.

I am 5'9, 108lbs, and usually would order a medium in overalls or jumpsuits to hope for extra length. Usually its not good enough and is still too short in the body and legs. I think I could've done with a small without sizing up because this is looser than expected from the product model photos. I have to roll mine because they are high water length on my ling legs. But because the legs are looser on my flamingo legs the rolling doesn't look the best on me. The front bib isn't too low with the straps adjusted to make the torso fit me. The color has zero fading add all in any areas, it's hard even to tell in my photos how very flat dyed blue they are. They are thicker and durable and better quality than even expected. There is enough room I think they could be maternity for a few months if you are built like me. I think they are a great value compared to name brands. These will work if you are taller like me, though not unrolled. I love that they are not so form fitting. They will be great in spring and autumn with a cardigan or sweatshirt. I recommend.

I am 5'9, 178lbs, Size 12-14, 38C. I bought an XL and it fit perfectly. I ordered the army green in an XXL because I wanted them to be a bit more baggy. These are not fitted or tight, but more of a perfect fit. Overalls in my opinion should be a big baggy, so I ordered a second pair in a size up (XXL). I will do a subsequent review on those, soon. Great quality. Comfy. Goes great with a body suit.

I am 5'9" 135lbs and I ordered a 5 long. They fit perfect and look great. They are long enough even when wearing boots and are stretchy without looking saggy. However, they are not bleach washed on the thighs and butt as advertised and look different than the photos online. Also, the stitching is not too great and already appears to be coming apart in a couple areas.

I am 5'9" and a pretty skinny 126 lbs. I bought 2 pairs in the exact same size - Red, Brown, Medium. I returned the red. They did not fit the same neither were they both of consistent quality. The red fit smaller & were narrower/tapered in the legs. The material was poly/cotton & thinner. The brown was a great fit, long enough and thick, comfy material. They are 65% Rayon, 35% Spandex! That means they will never shrink in the dryer. I don't detect any stretching from the Spandex content, which is odd, but for me, not a bad thing. Haven't washed them yet, so we'll see how they hold up otherwise. Maybe these pants were made in different countries, but now I'm looking to get a different color that is exactly the same as the brown pair. If you have bought other colors & you see Rayon/Spandex mix, post it in your review. I'll def order that color. It seems that I can't post 2 different reviews, Amazon keeps giving me the first review to edit for the second pair. So I've combined both reviews here. 2 stars for the Red, 4 stars for the brown .... Guess I'll average to 4 stars so the browns don't reflect badly.

I am 5'9" and have longer legs so finding jeans that fit AND are long enough has always been a challenge. These are stretchy, nice waistband that helps with tummy control and are long enough! Plus they are super cute and look great! Never thought I would wear 'jeggings' but here I am loving these! I have already ordered another pair and will stalk...I mean patiently wait for the black version in my size to restock! And you cannot beat this price!

I am 5'9" and the length on these is great! The waist band area is super stretchy and very comfortable, not too cinched in. The material felt nice and was not see through. I like where the pockets sit. I ordered the black and will keep them. I am considering ordering these in a second color as well!

I am 5'9" and the length on these is great! The waist band area is super stretchy and very comfortable, not too cinched in. The material felt nice and was not see through. I am 5’9” and these run the floor even with shoes on. Snug in the waist & butt but wide and loose legs. Comfy !!

I am 5'9", 135lbs. I originally ordered the 32" inseam in a size medium and they were a little long (which I don't mind at all) but they were definitely too big as you can see in my photos provided. The fabric and style were SO GREAT however that I ended up buying my own in a size small and in the color white. The small fits me GREAT! They are not so tight that they hug me but they allow my butt room to be free while also looking good ;) and my legs have space in the pants legs but the pants are not oversized. They are truly a very good jogger-style pant! I would describe the pants as lightweight yet warm because of the "fleece" type material inside which is INCREDIBLY soft. P.s. the white was not see-through! Definitely worth the buy

I am 5'9", 165lb. Ordered size large. These pants are comfortable and fit pretty well. They aren't as thin or as stiff as linen, but still breathe. I also appreciate the deep pockets. However, there are some things I don't like about them. My major complaint is the light-colored material is see-through. I hate that I will have to consider what type of undies or shirt I wear. Also, the front is somewhat baggy while the back seems to cling and emphasizes my crack when bending forward. The material also clings to show the front pockets underneath. Finally, the back pockets are stitched more to the side than the back. What is frustrating about this is that if they were stitched to the back, they could have helped with the transparency issue! I will keep them for comfort, but not order more.

I am a big fan overalls, so I was excited for these. Unfortunately, the probably will not become a best-loved, well-worn piece of clothing for me. Why is that? They ended up being baggier than I prefer. Another issue with these is that they are not for short girls, which is great if you’re a tall lass. But I am not quite 5’3” and these were super long on me. I included 2 photos, one with the cuffs rolled and the other without. I didn’t love the way they looked with the cuffs rolled, but I was not about to have my pants dragging like this was the 90s, you know? The final issue I had was the color. The ones I got are supposed to be a light pink color. The ended up being more orange (maybe you can see that my nail polish is orange and the overalls seem to match. I am a bit bummed about these pants. Lots of other reviews said they sized up and they fit a BIT large it wasn't a big deal because they had a drawstring. Well....I sized up and they are HUGE and the drawstring does NOT help. For reference, I am 5'7" and 140/145lbs, I usually wear a small or medium in bottoms and sized up to a medium. They are quite large on me. I plan to wash them to see if they will shrink down a bit, so stay tuned there. The drawstring is fully functional. The pockets are large and easily fit my iPhone 12. The material is a bit scratchy and doesn't have a lot of movement, I am hoping the washing will help with that as well. The material is a bit see through in the white. I had on darker panties when trying them on and they are very visible. However, because they are a looser fit, its nothing indecent. You can see the pockets through the fabric. Overall, I would go with your true size as they are meant to be oversized. The pants are just ok overall but hopefully will improve with a wash.

I ordered a medium in gray and the fit is perfect, I'll give it that. The elastic waist is comfortable, not too tight. The length is perfect (I’m 5’6”). If you don’t mind plain & simple, these are for you!

I am a curvy woman with a smaller waist and larger thighs. Jeans are hard for me to find to fit comfortably. These are great! I am 5'5 and these are size 14. I have ordered more of these Gloria Vanderbilt Amanda jeans in other colors. I am loving them!
I am a hip 56 y/o grandma and needed some cute shorts that didn’t go up my booty too much. These are perfect, super comfy and very flattering. I am 5’8” and got a size small for reference :)

I am a personal trainer, 27 weeks pregnant with my 4th. All my previous maternity pants have holes and look old. I am also getting larger faster being it my 4th. Now i am at 140lbs and these pants fit like a glove and feels like they will till the end. They check all the boxes for both work and home wear. From chasing my 3 little boys around, resting, to working with clients in the gym. I prefer cotton as a fabric because it is more comfy and warm to me but these feel close to the one pair of Atheleta pants gifted to me and i am definitely satisfied. Maternity pants are HARD to shop for. I hate when the crotch area bags or the belly band is uncomfortable or falls down, and so many are so thin... Not this one. I very MUCH RECOMMEND this brand to all expecting mamas. Will buy from them again.

I am impressed with these jeans! The color is great, and the fit is size accurate according to the sizing chart. They definitely are high waisted. The pants have a nice but slight stretch. They may be a little too toasty in a crowded place with heat, unless you just are cold natured. The pants are an average length (they were long on me as I’m 4”11) but will pair nicely with boots. You can’t really roll them up at the ankle as the inside lining shows. I do wish they left a little room without lining so they can be rolled.

I am in between sizes and bought a medium. I’m 5”3 and 140 lbs and sometimes need a small and sometimes need a medium. The medium fits great! Lightweight romper and it could easily be dressed up or dressed down. Elastic on the sleeves and ankles and comes with a removable belt. Highly recommend!

I am in love with these cute belts! I have a 30” waist and they fit perfectly. They have a nice “stiff stretch” to them and hold their shape nicely. The buckle is easy to fasten and stays buckled without worry of coming undone.

I am in love with these easy to wear pants. They fit just right and dress up or down easily. I am 5’2 and 144 wearing a medium. They hit just right on my waist and ankles. They are thicker than I expected but that is ok, makes for better fabric.

I am in love with these easy to wear pants. They fit just right and dress up or down easily. I am 5’2 and 144 wearing a medium. They hit just right on my waist and ankles. They are thicker than I expected but that is ok, makes for better fabric.

I am in love with these pants. I initially bought them for a trip to NY. I wore them all day, and walked over 10 miles in them and they were so comfortable and actually stayed up! I ordered a medium. I am IN LOVE with this brand! These pants are flattering, stretchy and suuuuuper comfortable. The quality of the fabric is great... I am 5' 4'' and around 130 pounds, usually wear size small, I ordered these in size 4 and they fit perfect! 10/10!

The sleeves are little long and the shoulders seem just a little too wide but I am short so I mostly expect that. Other than that I love it!

I am in the middle of my weight loss journey and needed something while I am in between sizes. I am 5’3 and weigh 216lbs (down from 262lbs!!) and I ordered size 18 Average. They are super comfortable and I am hoping that they will shrink a little in the dryer. Can’t beat the price for an item I won’t be wearing for very long. I will be buying more as I loose more weight.
I am in the XS which fits my 25 inch waist with no excess The buckle is a gold/bronze in a matte finish It looks expensive Happy that loose pleated pants and belts are back in Style

I am just shy of 5'4", 118lb. Measurement wise the size is exact...a little long in the leg for me, but I'm short so that isn't unusual. I just cuff the leg bottom. They are very soft and comfortable. I like being able to wear a snug shirt, and not have jean bunches underneath. Not a skinny jean or a boot cut jean. I would say they are a straight leg jean.

I am kind of in between size, medium, and size large, and I ordered the classic blue. First of all, the color is darker than the picture shows. They still are not real dark blue, but they are darker than shown. As for the size, I ended up getting the large and they are just a tad loose. I am 5‘4“ and 145 pounds. Also, they are long and come all the way down to my feet. The sanding on the backside is a little strange. Both legs are exactly the same shading under the pockets, but the positioning makes my saddlebags look wider than they are. I may have to get some sandpaper or pumice and try to add some more to the front and the back. I guess when you pay less money, you’re not getting an individualized shading, but all of the pairs will be the same. The rips are at the knees and nicely done. It seems like the fringe on the bottom of the right leg is about a half inch longer than the left leg also. They are very comfortable, and I suggest if you are in between sizes, maybe go with the smaller size. I feel like these are going to be a bit baggy after wearing them for a while.

I am looking forward to cooler weather so I can wear these pants. They are a wide leg thick ribbed sweater pant. The waist band is a little on the tater side, but the length is good for me with a size small and I am usually a size 4, 130 pounds and 5‘,5“ tall. They feel really good on and the material feels thick and luxurious and not cheap. The inside is a smoother texture, so not quite as soft but still comfortable.

I am making this short and (un)sweet..: DONT WASTE YOUR MONEY OR TIME Below are my reasons • THE COLOR DOES NOT EVEN REMOTELY RESEMBLE THE PROVIDED PHOTO OF “MAUVE” as you can tell in my picture I provided these look like totally different leggings, I purchased MAUVE what I thought was a beige/pink blush tinted or light pink leggings, what I received are dark brown(ish) with a purple tint.. it’s not even in the same color category, I’m ok with getting something that is “similar” to the color but this is on a whole other level, and yes.. I even double checked to make sure (1) I ordered the correct color (2) was shipped the item I purchased. I checked the tags, the label on the package and also amazon listing itself ... NOTE TO SELLER: to possibly enhance your reviews maybe update your listing provided pictures to be more accurate on actual color(s) in efforts to please your customer and prevent so many returns. (You can use my picture I provided if you want it’s pretty accurate) • SIZING IS OFF it’s hard to explain what I mean I realize these are One Size.. which means they should have a substantial amount of stretch to them, these do not AT ALL I have tons and tons of OS leggings and all fit fine not matter how big or small I am these are laughable (I am 5ft 174 lbs) they won’t go up the thigh and I have smaller thighs then norm. • THICK FLEECE (not good to wear for spring or summer months) I wouldn’t consider these versatile Type of leggings, they are just way to thick for comfort. SUMMARY: thanks to amazon there is a plethora of leggings options and colors and styles you can choose from, tons of sellers and all are one size (accurately) with rainbow full of colors all hovering the same price, I would stick to another brand in my opinion, just because a listing has over a 1,000 review it doesn’t necessarily mean they are worthy... these may be the worst leggings I have ever purchased unfortunately (and I have 79 pairs of leggings to date)

I am mildly obsessed with this dress and absolutely cannot wait for it to be warm enough to wear! It is just about the cutest style ever, made even better by the lightweight but traditional, no stretch acid wash denim. This material means it holds its shape without clinging. The style is extremely flattering, it’s like it’s made for beer belly days;). The top and sleeves are cut in a way to still show a bit of shape so you aren’t totally shapeless.The material is not soft but I think if I put it in the dryer instead of hand dry, it’ll help that. I took off a star because there is a very big missed opportunity for pockets.The buttons are functional thankfully, because I do have to unbutton it to take off (since there is no stretch).I am 5’6, 160 lbs, 34D, and tend to carry a tad put off weight in mid section. I am a true medium and so is this dress, so very true to size. Nice length for my height and preference.

I am more than happy with my overalls it was perfect I measure 5.1 I weigh 123 lbs size small a little long but nothing that cannot be solved the excellent price the quality is very good 100% I recommend it

I am never able to order jeans without trying on first but I heard so many great reviews that I had to try them. They are my favorite! Perfect fit that is true to size, soft stretchy material and I love the color and style. The only thing that I would change are the ties on the bottom. I am short 5’4” and wear flats so they hang and I have a hard time keeping them tied, I may just cut them off.

I am normally a size 12/14 and went with the Large, but I should have gotten an XL. Around my waist, the belt is at the last notch and around my upper body (think, sinching at the waist dresses, etc), it fits me better. I guess that’s good for the most part as I won’t have any “extra overhang” of the belt. (But, of course, that means I can’t gain any weight either, haha). For reference, I am 5’4, 185lbs, and apple shaped. Should have definitely sized up. I love that the belt is reversable. I did notice the white size has a CK design stamped across it, but it’s not terrible as you can’t really see it and it just makes the white side look textured. The material is durable, and I think this belt will hold up for a long time.

I am normally a size 4 and ordered the small with hesitation. The size chart recommended the small but I detest overly tight waist bands. I am 5’6” and 128 lbs and I am pleased with the fit. My photo is not the best but I wanted to show the leg split isn’t as high as indicated on the model. In fact, it’s hard to see at all until I sit down and cross my legs. The waist is 95% elastic with just the front section lying flat. The ties are mostly for looks but allow a bit of cinching, if needed. The fabric is lightweight, like summer chiffon, and not the best option for cold weather but will be perfect for spring summer. I classify the pants as dressy-perfect for the office or church. The pants will need to be de-wrinkled upon arrival. I have never been disappointed in the quality of this brand and I have many pieces.
I am not a huge fan of jeans. These jeggings however, fit comfortably. I am 5'1, 115lbs and purchased a size 3. A bit long, but overall the fit is great. Definitely not your average mom jeans/pants.

I am not a tall person by any stretch of the imagination -- I'm 5'3" on a good day. I ALWAYS have to order short/petite pants or hem up regular pants by several inches. Having seen the reviews on these saying that they shrink, I went ahead and bought the regular length ones. Goodness, am I happy I erred on the side of caution. They started with a 29.5" inseam (see photo). After two or three wash and dries, they've shrunk 2" up to a 27.5" inseam. They're nearly too short for even me, but they'll work. That aside, they fabric is thick, soft, and high quality. It's perfect for work, lays flat, doesn't wrinkle, and it gives a nice silhouette for curvy hips/bum. They're also pull-ons for extra comfort, and they have front pockets. I really do like them and I'll be getting several more pairs for work, but I feel bad for anyone taller than me.

I am really impressed with these jeans! I am truly shocked at how much I like them! I did cut the bottom as they were slightly longer than I like, but now they are perfect! I already purchased the other two colors! Some thoughts below: - Runs large. I usually wear a size 6 or 28 in jeans and I went with a 4 in these and they are PERFECT! I am 5'7" and 135lbs for reference. - The length is a bit longer than I like so I cut about 1.5" off the bottom. The photo in heels is full length and the other two photos are cut. I might cut a bit more off but have not decided yet. Even with the shorter length, they still look cute with heels or flats! - The material is somewhat soft but still holds its shape. It has a bit of stretch to it, but not enough that its going to stretch out after one wear. - Nice and high waisted which is what I think makes the wider leg work. - These are tight through the thigh but wide through the calf, they're perfect! Overall, I would size down one size, especially if you are between sizes. Expect the length to be around 29" inseam but cutting them is super easy if you want them shorter and they still look cute! Definitely recommend.

I am reviewing this as a mom with a bit of a fluffy body (I am EXTREMELY self-conscious about my waist and belly so no photos of the waistband on), 5'5"ish and usually wear an 8/10 -- so definitely not young and cute like the model. I ordered a Large in these pants and I am very pleasantly surprised.First, they are a cotton-twilly material that doesn't feel particularly soft initially but actually moves pretty well when wearing the pants. They have a boxy feel -- but that is typical of the cargo look (and my lack of an actual waist). I give the waist band 100 stars -- it is a mix of elastic and button/zipper so it has some give, doesn't compress on my belly or slip below a muffin top and it and is really super comfortable. I won't show any photos, but the band comes right above my belly button and securely above my hips and covers the small of my back completely-- so they cover everything and sit in a very comfortable spot. Even when I sit they are very comfortable and stay in place above my belly and hips. There are belt loops too just in case you need them, but waist wise the size is perfect for me, esp with the elastic!Length wise, these seem to run a bit long for me -- however I actually really find the rolled-up style with the sandals cute. For tennis shoes I rolled the hem up once and I think they are okay. The boots photos have no roll. The sandals photos took 3 full wide rolls on the hem. These could easily be hemmed, but I often like my pants on the longer side so I can wear them with different types of shoes and in different season -- so I am good with these. But, yes, I would say they run long.Lots and lots of pockets -- 2 back pockets, 2 hip pockets, and 4 cargo pockets. The cargo pockets are real and not just decoration. The top ones just have a flap, the bottom ones have a button with the flap. So lots of storage if you want it.I actually surprised myself and like these. I am always nervous about ordering online because I never feel anything fits me in a flattering way, and I second guessed my order a million times. But now that I have them on and see how incredibly comfortable they are on even with my body style, I am really glad that I pushed order. These are a keeper and I would definitely recommend.

I am satisfied with my purchase. I am 4'11 & 143lbs and it's so hard to find clothes that look decent on me. I got these in size 6 petite size and they fit perfectly. Just know they do not stretch at all.

I am short (5’0) and was afraid these would fit me too big. They can be adjusted at the bottom leg. They’re very comfy windbreaker style pants. They have a reflective stripe on them as well for nighttime visibility.

I am short.. 5foot2...but these pants make my legs look long. I felt absolutely amazing wearing them last night. I wish I could find pants made of this material... looks great on... buy them...don't hesitate!

I am size (US)4. Normally I will order a small, and once in awhile my voluptuous bottom is a little too big for a small. Overall, I'm pleased with them, especially since they're 100% cotton.
I am small but I decided to go Xs because I like it tight not loose. So fresh and comfortable. I am 5.3 ft tall 120 pounds .

i am so grateful to have found these jeans! i’ve struggled with jeans shopping all my life. i am 5’3 and 145lb. I got size 6 with 27in length. they fit perfect! super soft! they fit my short legs and thick thighs. plus they make my booty look great - with no sagging. i have to pull them up above my double belly button piercing when i sit down, so they do the weird “i have a d!ck” thing (see photo) but most jeans do. no complaints there really. they stay form fitting all day - even after 3 hours at the skatepark. i don’t find myself having to pull them up or adjust them at all but still feel stretchy and comfy 🙌🏼 i usually cuff my jeans but i don’t HAVE to with these - they’re the perfect length and tightness. but the ankle still has enough give to cuff them if i’d like. the waist is perfect- not too low but not too high [you can still see my top belly piercing :)] overall, recommend - i actually have these in 3 colors now

I am so incredibly happy with this product, I had to take pictures and do a review. I don't do this for every purchase (I couldn't possibly) but when I have an experience this positive, I have to acknowledge it so I give credit where credit is due and also provide other shoppers with information to help them with a decision. I bought these pants because I was searching everywhere for pants to match this bright purple blazer I had bought and it is just impossible. I saw these, and I knew it was a gamble, but they showed up in the mail the next day, and it was exactly the same color and hue as it was pictured on the internet. It is a perfect match! Not only that, but the fit is absolutely perfect. I think these are quite possibly my most comfortable pants in my wardrobe now. They are stretchy enough to not need a zipper or button (the ones you see are fake) but the pockets are REAL! All four pockets are nice and deep and functional. The fabric is firm enough so that it doesn't wind up looking like leggings (they look like fancy jeans.) They are formal enough to wear with professional attire. They are the perfect length for me (5'2") and they do not fit too tightly around the waist (a problem I find with way too many pants and skirts. They fit just like a glove. In fact, I was shocked at how perfectly they fit. They were almost out of my price range, but I am very very glad that I sprang for a few extra bucks and I may purchase a few more pairs in different colors now that I see how great a product this is. For your reference, I am 5'2", 122 lbs, 31" waist.

I would give this 10 stars if they were available to give.

I am: 125 lbs 5'3" 28" waist 38.5" hips I ordered a size 7: Front rise 9" (it fits like a high rise) Hip front 18" (18x2= 39") Length 31.5" Fiber/material content: Cotton 58% Rayon 21% Poly 18% Spandex 3% * Remember it will stretch and seem a bit bigger due to lots of poly and rayon; i like the poly and rayon, but will have to order a 5. * In my experience about 1/5 inch larger than a 7. * Prob won't shrink much due to lower content of cotton * I REALLY like the feel...due to lower content of cotton * If you like a soft feel, look for rayon, ramie, poly content * If you like a thicker feel, look for high cotton content. * In pictures shown here, I am wearing a thick fleece under the jeans. Only practical if I plan to wear thick fleece all the time. Even so the waist on the back side was loose. * Really like the pocket detail stitching.

I appreciate reviews when people give their body stats and and the size of the garment they ordered. It makes it so much easier to figure out what size you should order. So I am 5' 1 1/2" tall and weight is 156-lbs. and I ordered a large which fits perfect. I am very short waisted and these sit just slightly below the belly button on me. So I don't know that I would consider these high rise. The fabric has a tiny bit of stretch/give to it but its definitely what I would call a cotton twill. The color is a nice Army Green, lots of nice deep pockets and very comfortable. The washing instructions say to hang dry, but I will probably put them in the dryer on the lowest setting just to fluff. Also my inseam is about 30" and the length is perfect, if you have longer legs these would be too short. I hope this helps.

Wearing high heels they are right above the floor. They are long. They are super baggy from the knees down. I like flare pants I own several but these pants have an extra two inches of flare.
I bought small and medium in the same style and color. Medium was way too big it fit like a large and was long. Small is slightly tight but perfect for my leg length (usually 25-27 inseam)

I bought the "Sky Blue," size M (I am 5'9" 145 lbs). They are very comfy and stretchy, and they're pretty cute too. Sadly, they're just too short for me. In the picture, the legs looked like they were cut straight across. But the shorts I received were cut more on an angle (higher on the outside edges). So there's just not enough coverage for me. If you're looking for very short shorts, I would recommend these because of their other positive qualities. But unfortunately, I have to return these and continue my search.

I bought the 29 in "Bells & Whistles". I am 5'6. My inseam measurement is 29. These jeans say the inseam is 32, but they do not touch the floor when I am wearing flat shoes. My waist measures 30 and these fit nicely. I weigh 143 with most of my weight at my stomach. Overall I am very pleased with this purchase.

I bought the black Jean jeggings in 1X . Not the size that states , fits most . I went to the next size. My weight is around 165 - 170 lbs . My height is 5'3 . The jeggings are very comfortable. They have a lot of stretch. The wide waist ban does not roll . In the black they are not sheer at all . The jeggings have back pockets. They do fit close to the body but don't dig in . I would not call them tight but close to the body . Today I wore them with a shark bit shirt not tucked in . I did tuck the shirt in a bit for the picture. I know some women like to tuck their shirt in a little bit . You can do both with these jeggings . The material is great for hot weather. It was about 90 degrees in my area . The jeggings run true to size .If you are slender to medium in weight I would recommend the , fit for all . If you are slightly overweight, size 14 - 16 go up to the next size . People who are size 18 and above I would recommend the last size . The stretch is amazing. They are very comfortable .
I bought the black pair and love them so I bought the olive green. After 1 washing they are now way past my ankles and I am only 5’4

I bought the Kelly Jeans & they’re great. I bought a medium short. I’m 5’0 ft & 125 pounds. I washed in cold & hung to dry. No difference in color or shrinkage IF you wash as I did. Mine are dark blue & great stitching. No untangle strings like people are saying. They’re VERY comfortable. I’m wearing 3 inch heels so a little long IF I didn’t wear my boots or sandals. Definitely great jeans plus makes my butt look good..lol

I bought the light green in M. I am 5.4 and weigh 137 pounds. So in height I should be the same as the model. I have added 4 pics. 2 where I wear the pants just below my belly button and 2 where I have it at my waist. As you can see if I wear it at my waist they are way too short (at least for me), definitely not like in the photos. However, as the waist is a bit loose, I don't mind wearing it below my belly button. So be warned and be aware that if you are above 5.4 and order an M you may find them too short. Hope this helps!

I bought the light green in M. I am 5.4 and weigh 137 pounds. So in height I should be the same as the model. I have added 4 pics. 2 where I wear the pants just below my belly button and 2 where I have it at my waist. As you can see if I wear it at my waist they are way too short (at least for me), definitely not like in the photos. However, as the waist is a bit loose, I don't mind wearing it below my belly button. So be warned and be aware that if you are above 5.4 and order an M you may find them too short. Hope this helps!

I bought the Nude color in small-medium. I am 5'4, 137lbs. They fit true to size. They had some weird black line running through the front of one of the legs, but I didn't mind because I had only planned on wearing them beneath tights so I can still dress up for work while being warm with the skin-colored leggings underneath. Walked out into the 30 degree cold at 6 this morning and didn't freeze to death. Perfect for what I needed.

I bought the pink, small. I am 5'2"/ 110lbs.. Very light weight & thin, soft material. I really need an XS as they were very loose out of the package, but they dont offer that size in this style as far as I see. They were sagging after wearing a short time. I didn't know the sides were slit. Not that it really matters, just saying they are. Hoping I can wash in hot water & high dry to shrink. They need you to fill them out! I suggest size down if possible.

I bought the skirt in blue gradient and also in green, both in the large sizes. The large blue gradient one fits like a US 14, and the large green one fits like a 12. I am 5'7 approximately 205 lb, and the large blue gradient was snug but very flattering. That means that I, unfortunately, will return the large green skirt, which is probably 1-1/2 to 2 inches smaller in circumference. I'm not sure if all green skirts are off in sizing (or of the blue is off) or if it's just this one, but it was a disappointment nonetheless. Otherwise, the fabric is medium weight (i.e. won't show off every texture point from your body underneath) and has some stretch-- very flattering. The line from waist to hip will accommodate someone with a small waist and curves. The waist sits at the true waist and is not a drop waist garment.
I bought the tan and the navy, I have a 45 inch waist and these fit great! They are really nice quality for the price too. Fit comfortably without digging, even when seated.

I bought the two pair of denim color and I love them ! They are so soft and comfortable. I bought my normal size I would in a pair of leggings from kohl’s and they fit the same. I have only wore each pair once so I can’t speak to the longevity of them right now. The darker pair are almost a black jean color Which I really like them. I am 5’4 and 169lbs and got xl and they aren’t baggy or falling off be they fit great.

I bought the XXL which is a size 20-22. I am 5”3 250 lb so I’m pretty curvy and wear it in my hips the most! It fit perfectly! I love them and they flatter my butt as well! Just a tad loose by my ankles but it’s okay I can roll it up.

I bought them for a dressy outfit & they’re great! The small was too short to wear with heels (5’ 4”) and the medium was still short but okay. They’re thin and airy. Update: still love them but they pick really easily against things. I have a whole line down the front now.

I bought these after seeing similar ones on TikTok. I’m 5’2 131lbs and I bout a size small. They fit fine, around the waist they’re a little snug but not too bad, if you want a baggy-er look maybe order a medium. The hardware does not come attached but honestly not a big deal at all. I would recommend them for sure!

I bought these because an influencer said they were a dupe for a more expensive brand of pants. I love them! I’m 5’2” and usually order a small petite. The reviews said they run small so I ordered a medium petite and they’re perfect. I’m excited to wear them for travel and just as a comfortable alternative to jeans. I could work out in them or throw on a nice shirt and some jewelry for a dressier outfit. I definitely recommend these pants.

I bought these because reviews said they were lightweight and I was looking for comfy lounge around pants for summer. I was not disappointed! Love the pockets, love the weight of the fabric, love that they’re soft. They were a bit stiff when I first got them but after one wash they softened up quite a bit. I ordered up a size because of reviews that say they shrank a bit in the wash. I recommend you do the same because they do, indeed, shrink in the wash. I’m 5’4” and about 130. I ordered a large and after washing, they’re perfect. You can’t beat the price so I highly recommend that you get a pair while you can. I originally ordered light grey and came back today to order some additional colors only to notice that many of them are no longer available in sizes I would buy :( I’m hoping they’ll restock because I could absolutely live in these. VERY IMPORTANT UPDATE!!! I received the black and white buffalo checked ones a few days ago and they are a completely different fabric. The grey ones that I fell in love with are 60% polyester/35% cotton/5% spandex. The buffalo check ones are 95% polyester/5% spandex. They are neither light nor are they breathable. I ordered a large again because I thought they’d be the same as the light grey (silly me for thinking that ordering the same pants in the same size but in a different color would result in getting pants made of a completely different fabric.) They obviously did not shrink when washed and I’m swimming in them! If you order that color, you may want to size down BY A LOT.

I bought these first in white in a 6, and LOVED THEM, then they became baggy as I wore them (in a cute way though). So I bought the grey and red in a 4 and they fit perfect. I normally go between a 4-6 in normal pants so I'd recommend sizing down because of the stretch. These are my new favorite pants. I have worn them the last 4 times I have gone out. Perfect for any occasion, and great with a bodysuit. I have a small waist and wider hips and the 4's fit perfectly, no belt needed.

I bought these for a 70’s costume. I am 5’4, apple shaped body. I usually wear a size 16 and I bought the XXL. I definitely could have sized down one. These particular pair run a little big and have some stretch. They have a large flare at the bottom. They are really long. In this picture I am tall wearing platform shoes and they are still pretty long. I will be keeping them and I’ll wash and dry to try to shrink them a little. Overall good quality.

I bought these for a 70s party and ended up keeping them for casual wear! I have recently gained some weight and my nutritionist suggested I get comfortable with the weight I am, and buy some clothes that feel good. These fit that bill. And as a bonus, my husband thinks they're pretty cute too. I am less than 5ft tall, so just cut 3 inches off the bottom so I could wear them with flats. I might need a few more pairs.
I bought these for a 70s party, but I will be wearing them for way more than just that! Super cute. I’m 5’7” and the size 10 fit me perfectly, including length wise.

I bought these for a 70s party. Fit was great. I ordered a small, the length was perfect, I wore them with short (2-3in) heel clogs. I have a small waist and thicker thighs and bottom. 5’6, 34/36 bust, 28 waist, 36 hips, 150lbs

I bought these for a casual wedding; they are lightweight and very comfortable. They are a bit more flattering than some other palazzo-style pants because of the top layer, which flows nicely. They are advertised as capri pants, but they are full-length on my 5'4" frame. The pants are not a bright white, but they are pretty close. The blouse that I'm wearing in the photo is bright white; the color difference isn't that noticable.

I bought these for a concert and I have to say I'm very impressed with the quality! First thing is they are long. I am 5' 6" and they covered my feet I wore platform shoes and it was perfect. Second thing they are not itchy! They have a nice inner lining but my legs do rub together, thicc thighs and all, and the sequins caught a few times but that was after I had them on for a few hours. Third they are a bit big at the top but my high waist is smaller than my hips I would size down next time and get a slimmer to wear under them. I will definitely be buying more pairs in the future they are fantastic!

I bought these for a family photoshoot and I’m obsessed! Love love love!!! They were stretchy enough to not feel constricted but still kept my figure! Not bulky and frumpy! 10/10 recommend! I am 155lbs 5’6” and got the size medium! ☺️

I bought these for a themed birthday party. They are light weight and very comfortable! I didn’t get hot and the waistband stretches to give you extra room if needed! I am 5 foot 6 inches tall and 150lbs for reference. I bought a size large. Since I do not really wear this style of pants for my day to day activities, they will become lounging pants for the house as they are really that comfortable to wear. I recommend!!

I bought these for a trip abroad. They are very stretchy and I likely could have sized down. However, they were cute as is, and went with all my tops. The big pockets in front were a large plus, and they were flattering and cute. I tried to buy some from a bigger brand and they were stiff, uncomfortable, and too small despite getting my “size” and advertising stretch. These were much better. I’m taller (5’10”) and sizing was accurate if not a bit big.
I bought these for an upcoming cruise. They're lightweight and comfortable. Long waisted. They are a bit long for me (5'4"), but I will tie the ends when I'm not wearing heels.

I bought these for family photos and I was very pleased! They look a little more cranberry in photos than burgundy but they still worked perfect. I’m 5’7 and 140 pounds. I bought a size medium and they fit fine! There was a bit of room in my waist but I don’t feel like a small would have been flattering at all. With the belt, you can also tighten it a bit more. They are quite long. Being 5’7 and wearing flats, a bit touched the floor so shorter ladies may want to wear a heel of some sort. I will probably buy again in a different color. Worth the money FOR SURE.

I bought these for my 60’s themed birthday party. I bought 2 pairs in 2 different sizes & brands. These I liked best cuz of the red embroidery detail. They were comfy & no problem with length. I’m 5’7 & 130 pounds for reference & a size 8. I ordered these in the 8 & they were fine. The only downside was I really needed a belt. I kept having to pull up on them all night. They seem a little long in the crotch & I’m long waisted which is weird. Anyway, I like them so well I will be wearing them after the party! I washed them in cold & dried them on low. We’ll see how they fit now.

I bought these for my daughter who is 17 weeks pregnant. She was outgrowing her regular jeans and needed something comfortable. They come down to her ankles which she likes. And they fit snuggly uncomfortably. She currently weighs around 122 pounds. And she is 5 foot five.

I bought these for my daughter who is 17 weeks pregnant. She was outgrowing her regular jeans and needed something comfortable. They come down to her ankles which she likes. And they fit snuggly uncomfortably. She currently weighs around 122 pounds. And she is 5 foot five.

I bought these for my daughter who is 6 months pregnant. She loves them and they look fantastic on her. She is 6 feet tall and the.length is perfect for her. She bought a medium. They were a perfect fit.

I bought these for my granddaughters Lainey Wilson bell bottom themed party!!💕. I’m short so I thought they’d be way too long! I bought a size 14. I’m 5’ and weigh 160 with a big booty! I could have gone with a 12 as they were stretchy! So fun to wear!!
I bought these for my mom in size 18, and she loves them. She is 5'5, waist 38inches, and 209lbs. They are comfortable, and the length is perfect.
I bought these for my trip to Japan. it's soft and comfortable, I stayed warm outdoor all day visiting temples and fish market. I'm 5'6" 130 lb and got size 6. It fits perfect.

I bought these for work, but they may be better suited for more casual wear. The material is comfortable. 95% polyester, 5% elastane. I had to spend quite a bit of time ironing them on low to get the deep creases out from shipping (and that was after trying washing and drying on delicate and wrinkle-removing spray). They're still pretty wrinkled in some places. For reference, I have a 33" inseam, so these pants may not work for shorter people.

I bought these for work, where I am required to wear khaki pants/shorts. The fact that they have functional front and back pockets was a HUGE selling point for me. I am 5'3 and between 125-130lbs. My waist was 30" at my time of purchase so I could not decide between small or medium because according to the size chart, I am at the upper spectrum of small (25 - 32) and at the lower spectrum for medium (28 - 38) and I really do fluctuate between those sizes depending on the brand. I ultimately went with small and they fit nicely with absolutely no squeezing of my body. I am so comfortable at work and because of the texture of the fabric, they look like form fitting pants rather than leggings. As you can see in the photo, the pants are too long for me, so I will stick to the capri style. I've worn them once a week for the past month and although I have followed the directions for washing and drying, the fabric is starting to look like its going to pill so I am not sure how much longer they will look nice. If I order more to wear outside of work, maybe I'll try hanging them to dry and see if that helps.

I bought these for work. I love them for work! I needed 100% cotton jeans and these did the trick. They’re not super flattering but boy are they comfortable! So great for lounging, running errands, they’d have FANTASTIC for gardening, and they are great contract/construction work. I wore them when I visited power plants for work and I will wear them again for gardening and other outdoor adventures when it’s hot out and I need long pants. I love these pants!! I wish they were a little more stylish so I could wear them more often... I mean... I could... but I don’t have that lien or courage... yet. BUT, I will wear these every opportunity I get and maybe I can find a way to make them stylish. I think it’s my body. Some women could definitely make these stylish. I’m a little shorter and more petite. I think for these to be stylish you probably need longer legs. I have to to roll these at the bottom and I look like a little girl. I also got the smallest size they offered and they get a little roomy... they may be made to be that way though. Anyway, I seriously do love these. Comfiest and most breathable jeans that I have ever worn. I want MORE 100% cotton jeans. Please!! They truly are amazing. GET THEM. They may look great on you, just not as much on me. If the way don’t look “cute,” keep them for fun and rugged activities/gardening. P.S. I got a size 4. This was the lowest offered when I bought them. They stay up because of where they sit on my hips though. I’m something like a 27in waist, 34-35inch hips?? Waist size doesn’t matter as much for these... or they didn’t for me... I’m 5’3”

I bought these in a size 6. Size 6 women’s at stores like JCPenny normally are my ideal size. The waist on these is absolutely Too Snug and tight , it is very uncomfortable. Normally I’m either a size S or M depending on the brand. These pants are 14 inches across the band when I measure them with tape (per see the picture attached), which seems like it could fit especially with these being advertised as stretch, I don’t think the waist is stretchy at all for this type of pants, I would probably have to size up to an 8 but I’m not sure I will be as these I am going to return due to the band being non stretchy imo. For reference right now I’m weighing around 130 lbs , my height is 5’1.5 inches my waist measures approximately 28-29 inches and my hips are 40.5 inches, athletic build.The material is smooth and pretty thick and feel comfortable on the skin as the fabric is 53% cotton 39% nylon 8% spandex , so material feels professional and soft. Front pockets are real and back pockets are fake which I think looks good because it doesn’t look bulky on the backside but smooth and sleek on the bum. Overall these pants could be great , and the inseam options are very good for different heights, but with 8% spandex I would expect way more stretch and these don’t have that. I hope this helps someone as I have a hard time buying clothing. On my experience stretch pants usually can accommodate 8-10 lbs loss or gain weight and these just aren’t forgiving and won’t stretch to your size with weight fluctuations.

I bought these in black, bungalow khaki and indigo rinse, all size 6 short. They are incredibly comfortable and flattering but the lengths are all different. I bought the black pair first and loved them as they were perfect length for me (I am 4’11”). Since I loved the black pair I bought the khaki and indigo colors and they came way longer. Usually I have to wear heels with “short” pants but I didn’t have to with the black pair. The khaki were like half an inch longer so not terrible but the indigo were much longer. I returned the indigo and khaki and kept the black. I love them and wish the lengths were consistent because I’d buy every color if they were.

I bought these in blue and love them. Very stretchy and comfy. I’m 5’7 and 155lbs and purchased a medium. There is still a lot of room if my body decides to grow, but they did not stretch out after a few wears without washing. I am disappointed that the second pair I ordered in the Pecan had white lines on the top. I think to make them look worn but it doesn’t look natural. In the ad photo the lines are not noticeable. I will be returning. Would love them if they didn’t have the lines. Very pretty color.

I bought these in silver first. Turquoise is my favorite color. Ended up buying them in both colors. The silver has a white background. The blue have a blue background. Wore them to a friend's 60th Birthday, was comfortable all night. I don't notice if any sequins have fallen off. Got tons of compliments on them. I wore them with silver booties they are a little long but I just pulled. them up. I am 5'6' and wear a size 4 pant. I ordered the small. I'm tempted to get the red pair as well ;)

I bought these in size S/M but I think I could've gone with a Large very easily. I'm normally a size 6/8 and small in women's clothes, medium in anything"trendy" (like forever 21, H&M, etc.). I'm 5'8”, measurements 34-24-38, and most pants are a little short on me, these were no exception. I was expecting to probably have to exchange these for the larger size, especially right after I took them out of the package. They look like clothes for a ten year old, but these leggings stretch an absurd amount. I would not suggest a S/M for someone who has any extra "love-lumps" going on because I feel like these will role down in that situation. They're high waisted enough to feel really comfortable and they're not the warmest leggings but it's not like I can feel a breeze when I'm wearing these (like some other leggings I have, looking at you Target). Would buy again. My biggest suggestion is that, if you are trim and slim, buy the S/M. If you are anywhere else on the spectrum, buy the Large.
I bought these in the black, green and gray and I love all 3. They fit perfectly. I’m between 5’3” and 5’4” and they’re the perfect length.

I bought these in two different sizes, so I am going to have similar reviews. The fabric on these is very nice, with a soft, smooth finish. They have a good amount of stretch -- better than the PU leather type pants. There was no strange smell to the fabric. The XL and XXL both fit my girlfriend well. She is 5'10" and an average sized American woman. The sizing chart on the product page appears to be accurate. These are very shiny and do a good job of giving the leather look, while still being comfortable and breathable. On the XL, there were some loose threads. I was able to cut them without damaging the integrity of the pants. On the XXL, all of the seams and stitching were perfect. My only other issue, other than the loose threads is that the product description appears to have changed since I ordered these. The product page now refers to these as "jeggings". This are not jeggings, they are leather look leggings. You can see this clearly in the pictures, so I don't know why the page changed. I would recommend these.

I bought these in white first, size M and I’m 5’9, the fit was amazing and just the perfect length both with and without heels; it went all the way to the floor. I decided to get another pair in blue because I loved them so much, but these were a disappointment. I think it was worn and returned because out of the bag, it smelled like laundry detergent and the tag shows wear and tear (I’ve attached a picture). The fit is much tighter and it’s much much shorter, I thought maybe I accidentally purchased a Small but that wasn’t the case. The material also feels different — more rough and itchy than the white one. I think the person washed them and they shrunk and altered. I’m returning.

I bought these Jeans size XXL based on the sizing recommendations, my daughter normally wears size 11 or Large she is curvy so that's why we got XXL when they arrived since it was a xmas present we had to wait until after xmas. Once she opened them tried them on they were too loose from the waits as well as the hips/legs. Glad to know we could return them, as soon as I got the email that about the refund I order another one but this time we ordered size Large it arrived fast and she tried it on and it fits just perfect. she is 5'3" 155 lbs she has sort of hourglass body shape with just a bit more on the hips. (hope that helps you when deciding on buying this Jeans). The picture is just to reference body shape so it helps you.

I bought these jeans based on my waist. They fit perfectly. I'm 5'2, 165, and I bought an XL. I may need to use a belt at work. The hands down best part about these jeans are all the pockets space, especially the front pockets. They do bunch up around my ankles a bit, but not enough to cover my platforms, but my converse look very cute.

I bought these jeans based on my waist. They fit perfectly. I'm 5'2, 165, and I bought an XL. I may need to use a belt at work. The hands down best part about these jeans are all the pockets space, especially the front pockets. They do bunch up around my ankles a bit, but not enough to cover my platforms, but my converse look very cute.

I bought these jeans because I like my jeans a light-blue color. I took this pictures fresh out of the package. These jeans just look worn out, not at all like the pictures advertised. I do love this brand however because it's the only brand that fits me at 5ft. tall.

I bought these jeans for Chris Brown concert and I’m so glad I did. The stretch was PERFECT and for sure worth the price. The many pockets came in handy since I did not want to carry a purse. I normally wear a size 11-13 depending on where I’m shopping and I bought a size large in these. I’m 5’7 190.

I bought these jeans for my kids. They like trendy clothes, they wear jeans with holes in them, and I thought these are a shoe in. The jeans arrived yesterday, and surprisingly my girls weren’t too interested. I think because it’s summer and they’re thinking shorts and mini skirts rather than jeans. Big win for me! I cannot believe how amazing I look in these jeans. Now, I’m not the type of person to compliment myself pretty much ever. I’ll be the first person to point out my wrinkles, jowls, saggy bat wing arms, and lumpy cellulite allll over. But these jeans make me look like a movie star. I don’t know what kind of magic was sewn into the fabric, but they’re comfy with just the right amount of stretch, they stay on all day… So they’re stretchy, but they snap back where they need to, they aren’t low rise, but they don’t go up to my chest. I’m telling you, these are perfect. I think the only people who might not love these jeans as much as I do are taller people. I say that only because I have a 30 inch inseam… a lot of my friends have a 32 or 33 inch inseam and these jeans would be a little bit too short for their liking. Some women prefer the ankle length look, and this would definitely work for that. These jeans are absolutely perfect on me and I’m going to be looking at some of the other colors as soon as I’m done writing this review.

I bought these jeans for myself and I love them!! I am 5'3 and weigh 102 pounds, my waist size is 24 inches and hips is 35 inches, so I bought a size 1. They fit perfectly and bring out my curves. They are very high waisted and sit right on my belly button. I HIGHLY recommend these jeans if you want a perfect high waisted Jean. They are very stretchy and long so it is also good for taller people. It depends on how much you weigh really for the sizes, a lot of people around my height say they got the size 3 but they weighed more so their Jean's fit them, but if you are around my height and weight a one will do you wonders.

i bought these jeans hoping they wouldn’t be too long, i’m short 5’3” and if paired with a 2inch heel boot (give or take), they are amazing!! super soft and stretchy on the legs, i’m 175lbs and got a size 12 and chef kiss 😘. and not to mention the deep pockets in the front and they aren’t too thick of a material, very flattering

I bought these jeans in a size small, and the length is perfect. I'm skinny, and I don't have thickness in my legs or my rear. So these were loose. I'm 5'6" and 110lbs I'm normally a size small for everything. I recommend them, the jeans are little high waisted for someone that doesn't have a rear, really black, just keep in mind they may be a little loose when you buy them.

I bought these leggings for a trip to Iceland this fall to wear under snow pants. The leggings are very nice, warm and soft. My stats: 53 y/o fit, 5’3.5”, inseam 28.5, waist 28”, hips 38.25”. The smalls fit perfectly. The black pair are water resistant as long as it is not a lot of water. But they fit great and are very warm! I highly recommend these leggings.

I bought these leggings for a trip to Iceland this fall to wear under snow pants. The leggings are very nice, warm and soft. My stats: 53 y/o fit, 5’3.5”, inseam 28.5, waist 28”, hips 38.25”. The smalls fit perfectly. The black pair are water resistant as long as it is not a lot of water. But they fit great and are very warm! I highly recommend these leggings.

I bought these leggings to wear with my concert tees for a rock concert I was going to. They are so comfortable and soft. They are a high rise fit so they would be perfect with a crop top. They aren't too thick or thin. These are now my go to concert leggings! I am 5'5 and 118.5 lbs and a small was the perfect fit. They held up well after washing. I always line dry my leggings so they keep their elasticity. I would buy these again!

I bought these Levi's hoping they were half as good as the reviews said and they Really, Really are! Long story short, I went off my diet and I'm feeling blahhh! I had to go to a school function last night and "be seen"... so I pulled these out of the drawer, took them out of the bag and hoped for the best. I was alittle worried because they have a "pull on" waistband, no zipper or buttons and I thought they might look alittle "old". But as long as you wear a shirt, tunic, sweater that comes down long enough, your good. The inside tummy panel really works great. I went with the 12 Long (5'10 185lbs was 180lbs) and the fit & length are perfect. They're were alittle tight going on and it was a questionable fight for a minute, but I won. I'm wearing the Harmony style.. These hide any bit of muffin top you might have. If your a bigger gal like myself, I highly recommend trying these. They are flattering, the style looks good on and the price is right.The Measurements For 12L:17" Across Waistband,10.5" Front Rise,32" Inseam. They are exactly what I needed. I paired these with a layered tunic and ballet flats and I felt good and was comfortable all night. Definitely Buying More.

I bought these looking for a more affordable alternative to the Aritzia ones that I have and love and these are pretty similar it’s just that the crotch area is a little long. I’m 5’2 - 145 and I got a small but could’ve gotten an XS if it was available. This shade is a little transparent but if I wear white or nude undies I’ll be fine. Def will be buying in more colors though!

I bought these on a whim because the price was right. I love the gray color - it's dark enough to serve as a black without attracting all of the hair but actual black jeans would. For reference, I'm 145 lb 5'5, athletic build, and the size 10 fits the way I like. If I wanted a slightly more standard fit, I would go with my regular size 8, but the 10 gives me room to do anything I might want to do around the house or out. I actually ordered another pair in a more traditional jeans color.

I bought these overalls for gardening so I can stop mooning the neighbors. I'm 5'7" 190lbs and size XL is comfortable and roomy to move around. My phone fits in the pockets and the material feels like a real jeans. Cute and stylish Soft Sky Blue demin overalls. I highly recommend these! They're very flexible!

I bought these pants because of the comments of them being tall girl friendly. I'm 5'7, 145 lbs but have long legs and a short torso. I am used to most pants being ankle length or shorter on me but these were great, I could even wear heels. The color is vibrant, I received so many compliments throughout the day. I bought these pants for a Caribbean vacation and they were really nice. Comfortable to wear and the tie waist helps to make sure it fits well. As you can tell, they are not cropped on me. I bought these pants for hiking, herping, and just being outdoors. They will be perfect for that. I'm 5'1" and 120-125 lbs. I normally wear a size 4, but after reading the reviews, I decided to buy a size 2 and they are still a little big around the waist. The length was ever so slightly too long which i prefer anyways and the amount of bagginess in the legs is perfect, I have no issues moving around which will be perfect. Update: Did not shrink after laundry, still big, but i still love them.

I bought these pants for my wife. She says they are very comfortable. They are just stretchy enough to fit comfortably, but not so stretchy that they get loose during the day. They are sized correctly, and are a good length. She is 5’5”, and 245 pounds, and the 18 fits her well. They are high waisted, and the material is sturdy denim, not something thin and too airy. There are belt loops, decent pockets, A button and zip closure at the front, and pockets in the back also. Very flattering also.

I bought these pants for professional headshots. They fit great. Reference, I’m 5’5, 140lb, athletic build with curves. Super cute, flattering, and comfortable! I have a 4 star because for the seam to line up straight on the backside, the front hook is off centered. Just going to move the hook over.

I bought these pants for travel. I love traveling in beiges, ecru, etc and this color was a perfect addition to my travel wardrobe. I wore it 3X just for boarding three (3) different flights on one vacation and to be honest it didn’t even get dirty at all, despite the color. I’ve gone ahead and also purchased the khaki to add to my travel wardrobe. Overall I say .. BUY IT …

I bought these pants in order to create an outfit that I saw online. The entire outfit as pictured online was around $200 and I was able to get the jacket and the pants for around $50. I bought these shorts after having a baby, and they are incredibly comfortable! The fabric has a good amount of stretch, and the high-waisted design is both flattering and supportive.
